validation_evidence.description: Documentation comments explaining each theme family mapping
validation_evidence.detail: Each family section has a comment block explaining which brand color maps to which family, the USWDS system token, and deltaE value. Comments include: Base (gray-cool) → Shilling Silver, Primary (blue-warm) → PathAble Blue, Secondary (mint-cool) → Intelligent Jade, Accent-cool (blue) → Bright Blue Brooks + Tech Teal as accent-cool-dark, Accent-warm (green-warm) → Lived-in Lime

validation_evidence.description: Upgrade instruction comment at top of _uswds-theme.scss
validation_evidence.detail: Comment block at lines 9-11: 'To upgrade USWDS: bump version in package.json, rebuild, verify no unexpected color changes. Only this file needs review.'

All $theme-color-* and $theme-link-* overrides are scoped exclusively within _uswds-theme.scss. No theme-color or link-color overrides exist in _colors.scss, _semantic.scss, index.scss, or any other src file.
